changeSet.author: msnopok (generated)
changeSet.sql: alter table config.robots drop constraint if exists ck_access_tool; alter table config.robots add constraint ck_access_tool check ( access_tool in ('search-system','vpn','proxy', 'cameleo-xyz', 'hidemyass', 'hola', 'google-api', 'anonymizer'));
changeSet.rollback: alter table config.robots drop constraint if exists ck_access_tool; alter table config.robots add constraint ck_access_tool check ( access_tool in ('search-system','vpn','proxy', 'cameleo-xyz', 'hidemyass', 'hola', 'google-api', 'anonimyzer'));
